content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.1%, Bank Nifty -1.13%, VIX +9.5% to 18.44 — risk-off open with broad-based selling. Auto/Realty/PSU Banks weakest; IT and Pharma defensive. With 15 CNC positions already deployed (65% of capital), priority is risk management on existing book — trail SLs on winners (PNBHOUSING +9.9%, COFORGE +8.6%, CAMS +2.7%, MARICO +1.4%) and let SLs do their job on laggards. No new entries warranted into a VIX-spike open.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1055.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "At +9.9% unrealized, well above Rule trail threshold (+4%). Current SL 1073.10 is only ~0.8% below CMP 1081.90 — too tight, risks self-stopout on normal noise (Rule 17/trail-gap discipline 1% floor). Loosening SL is NOT permitted (Rule MODIFY tighten-only), so the right move is actually to TIGHTEN further only if CMP supports it. CMP 1081.90, 1% trail floor = 1071. Current SL 1073.10 is ABOVE the 1% floor — too tight. CORRECTION: Cannot loosen. Keep current SL — will let position run naturally. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Note: prior MODIFY in decisions list was self-corrected. SL 1073.10 is 0.81% below CMP 1081.90 — slightly tighter than the 1% trail-gap floor but acceptable given +9.9% locked-in gain on breakout post-Q4 (PAT +19% YoY, brokerage upgrades to Rs 1,350). Cannot loosen SL per MODIFY rules. Hold and let either target 1135 or stored SL resolve."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Safe-haven hedge at -1.0%. With VIX +9.5% and geopolitical tensions intact, gold serves portfolio hedging function. SL 121 = -3.3% from CMP 123.87, within risk budget. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 822.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.4% unrealized. Current SL 820 = entry (breakeven). Per Rule trail mandate (a), at +2%+ should trail to breakeven — already there. Tightening marginally to 822 to lock small profit; CMP 831.85, new SL 822 = 1.2% below CMP (above 1% floor). Q4 PAT +18%, raised guidance, FMCG rotation play. Target 855 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1352.00,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+8.6% unrealized. Current SL 1352 already tight at 1.15% below CMP 1367.70 — meets 1% trail-gap floor. No-op MODIFY would waste signal per Rule MODIFY-noop. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Prior MODIFY no-op self-corrected. SL 1352 is 1.15% below CMP 1367.70 — already at the trail-gap floor (Rule 17). Q4 PAT surge (one-time tax-aided), strong order book, IT defensive tailwind. Let position run to target 1420 or current tight SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.9% unrealized. CMP 2998, SL 3000 — SL actually just above CMP, will likely trip on next downtick. This is a SL placement issue from entry; cannot loosen. Defense sector tailwind intact (FY26 PAT +41.8%, Rs 17,000 cr order book, corvette L1). Letting SL fire if it does — pre-SL exit discipline (Rule 17). Holding to thesis."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.7% unrealized. Current SL 820 already at +1.7% above entry — meets Rule trail mandate (a) for breakeven. CMP 827.45, SL 820 = 0.9% below — just under 1% trail-gap floor. No-op (same as stored). Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Self-corrected MODIFY. SL 820 is ~0.9% below CMP 827.45, slightly tight. RTA monopoly, Q4 record revenue, May investor meets ahead. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.3% unrealized. SL 1465 = 0.6% below CMP 1455.20 — already past or near SL. Thesis intact (Q4 PAT +37%, margin expansion, dividend). Per Rule 17, let SL fire if it does; do not pre-empt."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.7% unrealized. Research downgraded to NEUTRAL post-results (sector underperformance, SMP changes). SL 1580 is 2.9% below CMP 1606.50, adequate buffer. Zaynich USFDA mid-2026 binary catalyst is the upside. Hold to SL or target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.6% unrealized. SL 2755 = 0.9% below CMP 2780.80. Q4 strong, Rs 2,300 cr refrigerants capex, specialty chem tailwind. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.3% unrealized. SL 9020 = 0.7% below CMP 9083, tight. Q4 record revenue, 30%+ market share, Rs 47 dividend, brokerage target hikes (Citi 10,500). Thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.5% unrealized. SL 1955 = 1.6% below CMP 1989.70. FY27 25% growth guidance, defense order book Rs 10,961 cr. Hold to SL or target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.3% unrealized. SL 354 = 0.6% below CMP 356, near trigger. BFSI sector weak today (Bank Nifty -1.13%). Q4 PAT +30.6%, Macquarie target 415. Let SL handle — Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.0% unrealized. SL 10440 = 1% below CMP 10541. Auto sector -1.85% today the weakest. Q4 strong (PAT +34%), buyback at 12,000, dividend 150/share. Thesis intact; respect SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.1% unrealized. SL 472 = 2% below CMP 481.85. Q4 PAT +16%, raised FY27 guidance to low double-digit, FMCG rotation. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.3% unrealized. Q4 results pending in May (binary catalyst). Per Rule 11, large position into binary needs decision; current position 16 shares ~Rs 19,600 = ~2% of capital, below 5% event-trade threshold so binary tail manageable. SL 1190 = 3.1% below CMP 1230. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "confidence": 0.3,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN MIS LIMIT BUY 600x @ 133.50 placed 7472min (5+ days) ago — stale. Should be cancelled by execution layer or self. Not stacking another order per Order Hygiene. If still in book, it will likely expire same-day for MIS anyway."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "+9.9% winner; SL 1073.10 already tight at 0.8% below CMP. Cannot loosen, already at trail-floor edge."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Geopolitical hedge; SL within risk budget."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 822.00, "reasoning": "+1.4%; trail SL to lock small gain above entry."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "+8.6% winner; SL already at trail-gap floor."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Respect stored SL; thesis intact."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven+; let run."},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Respect SL; do not pre-empt (Rule 17)."},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Neutral research read, adequate SL buffer."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Thesis intact, SL adequate."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 strong, target intact."},
    {"symbol": "BHARATFORG", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Defense + 25% guidance; respect SL."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "BFSI weak; SL will handle if breached."},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Auto sector weak; thesis intact; respect SL."},
    {"symbol": "DABUR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "FMCG defensive, raised guidance."},
    {"symbol": "LAURUSLABS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Small size, Q4 pending; manageable binary."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BULLISH candidates in research surface today: THERMAX, NUVAMA, FINCABLES (capital goods cluster — POLYCAB already held, cluster cap approached); DABUR, BERGEPAINT (BERGEPAINT has May 12 results = binary in 1 session, Rule 11 reject); TITAN, APOLLOHOSP (no held cluster overlap, would qualify on a normal tape). NOT admitting today because: (1) book already 65% deployed across 15 positions (high diversification); (2) VIX +9.5% spike + risk-off open is not an accumulation tape; (3) capital goods cluster (POLYCAB held, BHARATFORG defense-adjacent, GRSE defense) already approaching cluster cap; (4) FMCG cluster (MARICO + DABUR held) — adding TITAN or third FMCG would stack cluster. Rule 18 explicit rejects per BULLISH name: THERMAX (capital goods cluster cap), NUVAMA (BFSI cluster — ABCAPITAL, CAMS held), FINCABLES (capital goods cluster cap), TITAN (consumer cluster with MARICO/DABUR), APOLLOHOSP (healthcare cluster with WOCKPHARMA/LAURUSLABS). Will reassess in afternoon batch if VIX cools and book churn opens slots.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book heavily deployed at 65% across 15 CNC positions on Day 22 with rolling 5-day P&L at -3,715 INR and win rate 12% — concerning execution quality. Today's priority is letting SLs do their job (Rule 17) rather than panic-trimming; preemptive exits on -1% to -2% positions have been the prior failure mode. Two MODIFY entries above were self-corrected when realized they'd be no-ops or loosening attempts — flagging the audit discipline. One genuine trail (MARICO 820→822) executes. Cash buffer 35% (INR 351K) is comfortable and provides risk dry powder; not deploying into a VIX spike open is the right call, not anchoring. HFCL stale OPEN order should be cancelled by execution layer (5+ day old MIS limit is essentially dead)."
}
